project.name: Cyntex :: SPI :: Transform
project.description: Transform port: the in-pipeline row-level transform contract (a stateless map of one event into zero-or-more events) plus the closed set of transform node kinds. Pure interface over the standard event envelope; zero third-party (rule R2: the port depends on the core ring only). The stateful (nest/join) and fan-in (union) node execution contracts land with the execution engine; this module predeclares the seam.
